name: autogrind
description: Use when the user wants continuous autonomous work without stopping — for long-running grind sessions across code, ML/data, research, design, or writing. Not for single bounded tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Continuous auto-work mode for long-running sessions
interface.longDescription: AutoGrind keeps the agent continuously working through a five-phase cycle: Overview -> Understand -> Plan -> Work -> Reflect -> 60s pause -> repeat. It is built for long-running code, ML, research, design, and writing sessions where the agent should keep pushing until you explicitly stop it.
defaultPrompt: continue improving until I say stop
